title: RunEvent
description: One canonical lifecycle event. Durable file order defines canonical order; seq is contiguous from 1; phase order is monotone; run_terminal is always last (FR6). Workload output bytes never become lifecycle events (D11).

kind.description: Open vocabulary — kinds are additive within a major schema, so this is deliberately NOT an enum. Required v0 kinds: run_accepted, placement_allocated, workload_ready, workload_started, workload_exited, artifact_collected, cleanup_completed, run_terminal.

message.description: Human-readable, diagnostic only — consumers branch on phase and kind.
